notes: This file freezes the first rendering-oriented v0.56 profile.
Tiles remain general-purpose intermediate-state storage; screen-space tiling is optional and not baked into the ISA.

data_model.packed_output: RGBA8_UNORM may be packed as one uint32_t per element

state_placement.descriptor_state: small or rarely-changing values use B.ARG and B.IOR
state_placement.state_tiles: large or hot rendering state uses dedicated StateTiles in the tile register file

tau_policy.fallback: VEC MPAR kernels are the required functional fallback for rendering PTOs
